conditions.title: Inherit one-portal shell and accessibility coverage
conditions.condition: Phase 8 may not fork patient surfaces; it must consume embedded and standalone shell contracts plus the 401 accessibility proof pack.

conditions.title: Preserve NHS App release controls
conditions.condition: Assistive surfaces must remain subordinate to existing release freezes, cohort gates, kill switches, and monthly pack posture.

conditions.title: Reuse identity and route continuity law
conditions.condition: Assistive work must bind to current SSO, return intent, external entry, and deep-link fences instead of minting separate patient identity or route truth.

conditions.title: Keep artifacts summary-first and PHI-safe
conditions.condition: Assistive artifact flows must preserve summary-first artifact presentation, byte-grant fences, outbound grant redaction, and no raw PHI-bearing URL telemetry.

conditions.title: Maintain disclosure-safe telemetry
conditions.condition: Evaluation, shadow, and assistive telemetry must inherit privacy-minimized event contracts and redaction checks.

conditions.title: Consume support and governance traceability
conditions.condition: Phase 8 operator surfaces must link back to what-the-patient-saw, support, audit, and readiness cockpit truth rather than creating isolated operator narratives.
